sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Wall Street Loses Iconic Voice: Art Cashin Dies At 83
feed.summary: Art Cashin, the legendary director of floor operations at UBS and a revered figure at the New York Stock Exchange, has died at 83. Known for his unmatched market insights and storytelling prowess, Cashin was a cornerstone of Wall Street for over six decades, CNBC reports.
